title: hohenbergia catingae var. horrida

The Hohenbergia catingae var. horrida also has a calming effect on the mind, reducing stress and anxiety levels, which can lead to a better quality of sleep and improved overall well-being. Its antifungal properties can also alleviate symptoms of skin conditions like ringworm and athlete's foot, while its anti-inflammatory properties can help to ease symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Additionally, it contains a variety of alkaloids, including hohenbergine and hohenbergicoline, which have been found to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties, providing protection against infections and promoting wound healing. parts: Hohenbergia catingae var. horrida has many medicinal parts, such as its leaves, roots, and rhizomes, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments. The leaves of this plant contain bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The roots and rhizomes, on the other hand, are rich in alkaloids and glycosides, which are believed to have analgesic and antiseptic effects. side_effects: Hohenbergia catingae var. horrida can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. If ingested, it may cause stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea due to its toxic sap.
